declined.claim: ChatGPT Plus is priced at $20/month for consumers.
ChatGPT Pro is priced at $200/month for power users.
ChatGPT Team is priced at around $25–30 per user/month for small businesses.
ChatGPT Enterprise is custom-priced at roughly $60 per seat at list price.
ChatGPT Go, an India-only plan, is priced at $5 per month.
Anthropic is reportedly closing a new funding round of ~$5B led by Iconiq at a $170B valuation.
OpenAI employed 100+ ex-investment bankers at $150/hour to train AI for financial modeling tasks.
ChatGPT weekly active users were 800M in October 2025.
ChatGPT weekly active users were 700M in July 2025.
Chinese AI providers (Xiaomi, Alibaba, MiniMax, Zhipu, DeepSeek, StepFun) collectively exceeded 45% of OpenRouter weekly token volume in April 2026, up from <2% one year prior

raw_pool.claim: ChatGPT Plus has amassed roughly 15 million active subscribers as of mid-2025.
OpenAI API costs approximately $0.03 per 1K tokens for GPT-4.
OpenAI API costs approximately $0.002 per 1K tokens for GPT-3.5.
API and licensing business contributes an estimated 15–20% of OpenAI's total revenue.
OpenAI agreed to pay Microsoft 20% of total revenue through 2032 under a renegotiated partnership in October 2025.
OpenAI projected paying more than $13B in total revenue share—mostly to Microsoft—across 2026 and 2027.
OpenAI offers bundle discounts of approximately 10–20% off for large enterprise deployments.
The Stargate initiative is a $500B plan over four years to build 10GW of AI data center capacity in the U.S.
The Stargate initiative launched in 2025 with $100B deployed immediately.
Five additional US Stargate data center sites have been announced, bringing the initiative to nearly 7 GW of capacity and over $400B in investment over approximately three years.
OpenAI has committed to over $500B in disclosed cloud capacity across multiple providers as of early 2026.
OpenAI contracted to purchase $250B of Azure cloud services from Microsoft under revised partnership terms.
Amazon will invest $50B and OpenAI will consume approximately 2 gigawatts of Trainium capacity over 8 years under expanded AWS deal.
OpenAI committed to a massive cloud deal with Oracle beginning in 2027, widely reported as totaling about $300B over roughly five years, or about $30B of annual revenue for Oracle.
The multi-year Cerebras arrangement is valued at more than $10 billion, adding 750 megawatts of ultra-low latency AI compute.
OpenAI's chip strategy spans partnerships targeting 26GW of data center capacity, implying $1T+ in build-out costs.
The Broadcom collaboration focuses on a co-designed inference chip manufactured by TSMC, targeting 10GW between 2026–2029.
Stargate expansion is expected to create approximately 25,000 onsite jobs.
OpenAI advertising beta requires minimum advertiser commitments of $200,000.
Microsoft's total investment in OpenAI over past few years is $13B.
Microsoft receives 75% of OpenAI profits until it recoups its $13B in principal, then 50% until it reaches a total return of $92B.
Early OpenAI investors and employees are entitled to returns capped at 100× their principal.
OpenAI paying business users were 5M in August 2025.
Codex Security scanned more than 1.2 million commits across a 30-day private beta, identifying 792 critical findings and 10,561 high-severity findings.
Anthropic is raising ~$5B in new funding led by Iconiq.
73% of ChatGPT chats are non-work related and nearly half of conversations come from users aged 18 to 25.
OpenAI revenue grew at a 3x year-over-year growth rate from 2023 to 2025.
OpenAI's total disclosed funding is $178B as of 2026.

AI4S company 'AoMing Xingcheng' completed a Series A funding round of over 100 million yuan, and has established deep cooperation with more than 50 top-tier hospitals and over 100 health examination institutions in China.
DeepSeek is reportedly valued at approximately 20 billion USD, with both Alibaba and Tencent competing to invest, as founder Liang Wenfeng considers which backer to accept.
DeepSeek is seeking $20 billion, aiming not just for capital but also for pricing power in AI.
Zhipu AI (智谱) and MiniMax have seen their valuations surge 5 to 8 times, described as an 'Anthropic-style myth' hidden in their stock prices.
A leaked investor memo indicates OpenAI is planning a 30GW compute infrastructure buildout, which could consume 6% of all US electricity.

GPT-5.5 has been released, described as stronger, faster, and more expensive, with internal NVIDIA engineers saying losing it would feel like an amputation; the model optimizes its own reasoning infrastructure, achieving a 20% speedup.
GPT-5.5 ranks first on all benchmarks, surpassing Claude Opus 4.7, according to reports.
Anthropic has released a new AI economic report identifying which jobs are most likely to be displaced, with younger workers reportedly feeling the most anxiety.
OpenClaw's download volume has dropped to half of its peak, reflecting significant user decline since its launch.
Green Harmonic's (绿的谐波) performance doubled but its stock price fell sharply, seen as paying for the bubble in the billion-yuan robot joint market.
China's domestic AI large models have not yet over-expanded commercially; the industry is still in a recovery/realization phase transitioning from heavy investment to commercial returns.
A mobilization of 600,000 data collectors has entered the embodied intelligence space, with 2026 projected to see simultaneous rises in both funding and production capacity.
Meta Platforms signed a deal with CoreWeave for $14.2 billion in AI processing capacity through December 2031.
Meta Platforms signed an additional deal with CoreWeave for $21 billion in AI processing capacity through December 2032.
CoreWeave's total revenue backlog will reach $87.8 billion after the new Meta deal.
Meta Platforms will represent 40.1 percent of CoreWeave's total revenue backlog after the new deal.
AWS GPU on-demand pricing rose in April 2026: p5en.48xlarge increased from $36.18 to $41.61/hr; p5e in US West (N. California) reached $49.75/hr
Eclipse VC closed a $1.3B fund focused on physical AI, robotics, and AI infrastructure startups (April 7, 2026)
Forecaster Peter Wildeford projects combined OpenAI + Anthropic run rate could reach $240B by end of 2026
OpenAI's GPT-5.4 fell to #7 on OpenRouter rankings in April 2026; four of top five models are from Chinese providers
LLM API token prices fell approximately 80% across the industry from 2025 to 2026; Claude Opus per-input-token pricing dropped 67% (from $15 to $5/M)
Google removed Gemini Pro models from the free tier as of April 1, 2026; Flash models remain free but with reduced daily quotas
April 2026 saw 1,314 distinct startup funding events globally; 764 (~58%) involved AI or machine learning companies
Defense AI funding reached $12.7B in April 2026, with Shield AI projecting $540M+ in 2026 revenue (80%+ YoY growth)
ServiceNow raised Now Assist 2026 AI ACV target to $1.5B (up from prior $1B target) following Q1 2026 earnings (April 22, 2026)
ServiceNow Q1 2026 subscription revenue was $3,671M, up 22% YoY (19% in constant currency)
ServiceNow Now Assist customers spending >$1M annual contract value grew over 130% year-over-year in Q1 2026
Amazon guided for ~$200B in 2026 capex (much for AI infrastructure) and Alphabet plans ~$175B 2026 capex
NVIDIA B300 spot pricing reached $2.45/GPU-hr on April 16, 2026 via Spheron — undercutting H200 rates; B200 spot hit $2.25/GPU-hr on April 18, 2026
